**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Himark Technology Co., Ltd. presents a robust profile of a specialized, asset-light 'Smart Grid' solutions provider and electrical engineering firm. Despite its official classification as a 'Communications Equipment Manufacturer', the physical reality—operating from the 15th floor of an R&D building with 65 insured employees in 2024—precludes traditional heavy manufacturing. Instead, this 70 million RMB paid-in capital entity leverages its workforce for high-value engineering, software development, and systems integration within the power sector. Its core competency lies in Internet of Things (IoT) monitoring for industrial energy, smart power equipment sales, and comprehensive electrical engineering EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) services. The presence of corporate email architecture (@himarktech.com) aligned with its brand confirms a modernized, tech-driven operational model.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / SMART GRID INTEGRATOR & R&D FIRM
